title: Tilray Brands Completes Acquisition of Truss Beverage Co.
text: Tilray Brands completed the acquisition of the remaining 57.5% equity ownership of Truss Beverage Co. from Molson Coors Canada in January 2024. Truss was formed to lead innovation in the development of non-alcoholic, cannabis-beverages for the Canadian market. The acquisition gave Tilray approximately 40% market share in cannabis beverages. Beyond cannabis beverages, Tilray significantly expanded into traditional alcoholic beverages by acquiring brands including Shock Top, Breckenridge Brewery, Blue Point Brewing Company, 10 Barrel Brewing Company, Redhook Brewery, Widmer Brothers Brewing, Square Mile Cider Co., and HiBall Energy from Anheuser-Busch. Tilray Brands already owned other craft breweries including Alpine Beer, Green Flash Brewing, Montauk Brewing and SweetWater Brewing. This diversification strategy positioned Tilray as a beverage company with significant presence in cannabis, craft beer, and energy drinks segments.
